creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
(In reply to Zsolt Udvari from comment #22)
I don't know why there is nagios and monitoring plugins. Telling the truth I don't remember why I changed dependency to monitoring-plugins for my nagios configuration. AFAIR one of them is working "better" or maybe I needed check_uptime? After about 15-20 of using years I'm not able to say why I prefer monitoring-tools :-)

Also I think that there could be someone (some people) who are using nagios-plugins and merging theese two ports together will be bad for them?
